verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As a man, I admit I have so many mistakes In my eyes, In my mind In my heart always Especially by the words I say Errors I can see Lord You know what I have in me What my heart thinks before Thee To please men is not my desire Be pleasing to You is what I aspire

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To be honest, with all honesty To be sincere, with all sincerity To be faithful, with all integrity Till I see myself in Your image Lord Till all Your ways be my ways And we are one To be loyal, with all loyalty, To be waiting, waiting for Thee Till all Your love, till all Your deity Reveals in me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I know You had set Your predestinated plan In Your mind, I was there Perfect in Your sight With power and authority I was with You For the meantime I will endure By Your Spirit I will overcome Be watchful to avoid the fall Strive my best to live Your Call.
